name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident e4d71c1e-0822-47d8-a1cc-cc8e90a29a34
description:
Here’s an analysis of the security alert:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A critical alert indicates a potential command-and-control (C2) beacon attack targeting a specific host (10.0.0.99).

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution – The attacker is attempting to execute a malicious command on the target system.

3.  **ACTION:** QUARANTINE_FILE – Immediately isolate the affected host by blocking all network traffic and preventing any further communication.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
